ast.name: log
ast.source: loading from file
ast.target: 从文件加载中

ast.name: log
ast.source: Data in clipboard is no file.
ast.target: 剪贴板中的数据不是文件。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Data in clipboard could not be read as filepath.
ast.target: 剪贴板中的数据无法作为文件路径读取。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, uses the PDF's folder name (instead of the PDF-Filename) for sorting
ast.target: 启用后，将使用PDF的文件夹名称（而非PDF文件名）进行排序

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, uses the notes first line as Topic for primary sorting
ast.target: 启用后，将使用笔记的第一行作为主题进行主要排序

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to which the notes, including the extracted annotations, will be exported. The path can be dynamic './' to create a note next to the PDF or it has to be relative to the vault root. Paths must end with a '/'. Leave blank to export to the vault root.
ast.target: 笔记（包括提取的注释）将导出到的路径。路径可以是动态的 './' 以在PDF旁边创建笔记，或者必须相对于保险库根目录。路径必须以 '/' 结尾。留空则导出到保险库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the note to which the notes, including the extracted annotations, will be exported. You can use the variable '{{filename}}' to use the PDF's filename and combine it with prefix or suffix. If you don't use the variable all notes will be exported to the same file until you change the name.
ast.target: 笔记（包括提取的注释）将导出到的笔记名称。您可以使用变量 '{{filename}}' 来使用PDF的文件名，并将其与前缀或后缀组合。如果您不使用该变量，所有笔记将导出到同一个文件，直到您更改名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, every annotation is exported to a separate note.
ast.target: 启用后，每个注释将导出到单独的笔记中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the notes to which each extracted annotation will be exported. You can use the variable '{{filename}}' to use the PDF's filename and combine it with prefix or suffix. Additionally you should use the variable '{{counter}}' to add the index of the exported annotation.
ast.target: 每个提取的注释将导出到的笔记名称。您可以使用变量 '{{filename}}' 来使用PDF的文件名，并将其与前缀或后缀组合。此外，您应该使用变量 '{{counter}}' 来添加导出注释的索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will overwrite the content of an existing note with the same name.
ast.target: 启用后，插件将覆盖同名现有笔记的内容。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: The following types of annotations should be extracted:
ast.target: 应提取以下类型的注释：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use structuring headlines
ast.target: 使用结构化标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use Folder Name
ast.target: 使用文件夹名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sort by Topic
ast.target: 按主题排序

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Notes export path
ast.target: 笔记导出路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Notes export name
ast.target: 笔记导出名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: One note per annotation
ast.target: 每个注释一个笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: One note per annotation - export name
ast.target: 每个注释一个笔记 - 导出名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Overwrite existing note
ast.target: 覆盖现有笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Extract tags in annotations as Obsidian tags
ast.target: 将注释中的标签提取为Obsidian标签

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error creating note with annotations, because the notes export path is invalid. Please check the file path in the settings. Folders must exist.
ast.target: 创建包含注释的笔记时出错，因为笔记导出路径无效。请检查设置中的文件路径。文件夹必须存在。

ast.target: 注释正文

ast.source: Extract PDF Annotations on single file
ast.target: 在单个文件上提取PDF注释

ast.source: Extract PDF Annotations on single file from path in clipboard

ast.target: 提取PDF注释

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can specify which types of annotations should be extracted by the plugin. List the types exactly as listed here, separated by commas. The plugin supports the following types of annotations:
ast.target: 您可以指定插件应提取哪些类型的注释。请按此处列出的类型，用逗号分隔。插件支持以下类型的注释：
